name: Adrianne Martina Nevey
description:
Chief technology officer for Aston Martin F1 Team. Famed for having a potential to be a legend in F1 after her incomparable perfomance and expertise on the car and around the regulations.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Originally wanted to make her works for Scuderia Ferrari but seeing what had just happened on the irl's F1, I decided to take inspiration from it.

Obviously, I don't claim any ownership of any F1 trademarked stuff nor do I encourage anyone to do such.
creator: Zaryta
